title: L'Avventura
writer: Michelangelo Antonioni, Elio Bartolini, Tonino Guerra
actors: Gabriele Ferzetti, Monica Vitti, Lea Massari
plot: A woman disappears during a Mediterranean boating trip. During the search, her lover and her best friend become attracted to each other.
awards: Nominated for 2 BAFTA 6 wins & 12 nominations total
